title: Add kernel version requirement to install.md and touchups
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Added a kernel version requirement to install.md to satisfy #240.  Also moved the runc requirements from README.md to install.md where I think they belong.  Then some general polishing of install.md.
